commands.review_summary:
The PR tags provider-supplemental model catalog rows, adds a warn-only doctor check for hidden allowlisted models with config-merge opt-in guidance, adds focused tests, and records the change in the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: current main appends provider supplemental rows without provenance in loadModelCatalog, and explicit agents.defaults.models allowlists can make catalog entries unavailable via getModelRefStatus; the PR's focused test exercises the warning case.
